title: neomarica warmingii
intro: Neomarica warmingii, also known as Amaryllis belladonna or belladonna lily, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Neomarica warmingii can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
